message:
feat(bench): add PlasmaFx performance benchmark (bd-l8x9.9.3)

Add comprehensive Criterion benchmarks for PlasmaFx visual effect:
- Wave function benchmarks (plasma_wave, plasma_wave_low)
- Render benchmarks at 80x24, 120x40, 240x80
- Quality tier comparison (Full/Reduced/Minimal)
- Palette performance comparison (all 6 palettes)
- Animation/frame progression benchmarks
- Scaling throughput measurements

Performance results (all within budgets):
- 80x24 Full: ~150μs (<200μs budget)
- 120x40 Full: ~414μs (<500μs budget)
- 240x80 Full: ~1.5ms (<2ms budget)
- Throughput: ~11-13 Melem/s

Closes bd-l8x9.9.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
